description:
Let’s remove the noise.

Some say Dubai real estate is going down.
Some say it’s going up.

So let’s look at the data.

January 2026 sales: 16,996 transactions
That’s a 20% increase year-on-year.

Dubai REIT occupancy: 98% (up from 96%)
Record revenue. Record leases.

2025 Total Sales:
• 272,000 transactions
• 917 billion dirhams in value
• 20% year-on-year growth

Population: Nearly 4.3 million (+7%)
71,000 new businesses opened
14 million visitors in 9 months (+9%)

Sales up.
Businesses up.
Population up.
Tourism up.

This isn’t clickbait.
It’s government data.

If I’m betting on Dubai for the next few years?

The stats say yes.

00:00 – Dubai 2026 Market Overview: Up or Down?
Setting the context and addressing the crash vs growth debate.

01:10 – January 2026: 98% Occupancy & 20% Sales Growth
Dubai REIT data + January transaction numbers breakdown.

02:40 – 2025 in Review: 917 Billion Dirhams & 272,000 Sales
Full-year performance and the 1 trillion dirham target.

04:10 – Population & Business Growth: The Real Drivers
4.3M population, 71,000 new businesses, why jobs matter.

05:20 – Tourism Surge: 14 Million Visitors & Economic Impact
Why Dubai is a tourism and property economy, not oil-led.

06:15 – Off-Plan vs Resale: What the Transaction Data Shows
ACUD sales, ready property sales, and what really matters.

07:25 – Final Verdict: Would I Bet on Dubai?
Crystal ball moment and forward outlook.

description:
Dubai’s property market is flashing red — and the data is finally catching up with the headlines.

In The Big Short – Episode 6, we break down what’s really happening beneath the surface of Dubai real estate:

📉 Prices cooling across key communities
🏘 Resale values dropping in apartments & villas
📉 Long-term rentals turning negative
📊 “Record sales” headlines vs real transaction value
🌊 A massive supply wave hitting the market
🚩 Why 2025’s warning signs are now 2026’s reality

Using verified data from Property Monitor, REIDIN, Knight Frank, Espace, Betterhomes and more — this episode cuts through hype to show where the market is actually heading.

No sales talk.
No sugar-coating.
Just real numbers and real trends.

🔗 download the full slides: https://www.air-dxb.com/reports/dubai-real-estate-is-turning-red----the-great-slowdown-begins-the-big-short-episode-6

If you want honest insights into Dubai’s property market — subscribe and stay ahead of the curve.

Skip to topics:
00:00 Intro
3:07  Sales — What is The Market Saying 
7:02 Sales Value & Volume 
11:20 Mortgages and Ready Sales - Actual sales only account for 57.3% of total resale value
13:54 What other market reports say about Sales Volume & Value
19:40 Resale Market 
21:56 Big deals make news, small units make the market  
23:50 Rentals  
29:34 Launches & Handovers
32:00 2025 red flags are now 2026 reality

Primary Reports & Articles

Dubai Real Estate Market in 2026: A Shift Toward Balance
– Dubai Chronicle – market normalisation narrative with Sterling Capital Real Estate insight
👉 https://www.dubaichronicle.com/2025/12/28/dubai-real-estate-market-in-2026-a-shift/

Property Monitor – Monthly Market Report: December 2025
– Prices ease, off-plan share rises to 73.3%, volumes, resale counts, and launch data
👉 https://propertymonitor.com/insights/monthly-market-report/monthly-market-report-december-2025

Dubai Residential Market Report – H2 2025
– Espace Real Estate insights on sales volume, values, and transaction trends
👉 https://www.espace.ae/latest-property-news-detail/dubai-residential-market-report-h2-2025

REIDIN – UAE Residential Property Price Report: December 2025
– REIDIN’s price index data for December 2025 (used for rental & per-sqft insights)
👉 https://reidin.com/uae-residential-property-price-report-december-2025/

REIDIN – Dubai Residential Project Launch Tracker: December 2025
– Launch pricing, unit mix, and December launch volume & pricing data
👉 https://reidin.com/dubai-residential-project-launch-tracker-december-2025/

📍 LinkedIn & Social Media Insights (Industry Voices)

Zhann Jochinke – Property Monitor LinkedIn Post
– Market transition from acceleration to absorption, pricing and volume context
👉 https://www.linkedin.com/posts/zhann_property-monitor-monthly-market-report-activity-7418883662043090944-bOTC

📍 Additional Contextual Sources (Optional / Extended)

Dubai Real Estate Market Outlook 2026 (Sterling Capital Real Estate)
– Outlook commentary on maturity and stability ahead
👉 https://sterlingcapital.realestate/dubai-real-estate-market-outlook/

Construction Week — Market Analysis
– Additional narrative about Dubai property trends into 2026 (limited preview)
👉 https://www.constructionweekonline.com/analysis/dubai-property-market-2026

description:
Everyone is talking about Dubai real estate in 2026 — but very few are explaining where the real opportunities will actually be.

In this video, I break down where to invest in Dubai in 2026 based on different budget brackets, area fundamentals, and supply vs demand dynamics — not hype, not headlines, and not speculation.

This is a clear investment roadmap designed for international investors and high-net-worth buyers who want to position themselves correctly for Dubai’s next phase of growth.

🧠 What This Video Covers (Step-by-Step):
✅ Dubai Real Estate Outlook for 2026

• What changes between 2024–2025 and 2026
• Why some areas will outperform while others stagnate
• How supply vs demand differs by price bracket

✅ Where to Invest in Dubai in 2026 – By Budget

• Entry-level budgets: where demand stays strongest
• Mid-range budgets: areas upgrading in quality
• Upper & premium budgets: scarcity-driven locations
• Where oversupply is less relevant and fundamentals are stronger

✅ How to Choose the Right Areas for 2026

• Why quality upgrades matter more than price growth
• Which communities are improving, not just expanding
• How to avoid crowded segments and future pressure
• What international buyers should prioritize vs local buyers

✅ Investor Logic (Not Speculation)

• End-user demand vs speculative demand
• Why rental resilience matters in 2026
• How to protect capital while still targeting upside

This video is built to help you invest with clarity, whether you’re entering Dubai for the first time or allocating larger capital for the long term.

📩 Thinking of Investing or Moving to Dubai?

I advise clients globally on where to invest, how to structure purchases, and how to avoid crowded or weakening segments — based on real market behavior, not noise.

Our team will guide you through the entire process of buying, investing, and moving to Dubai with ease.


🔔 Don’t forget to turn on notifications to never miss a new video.

📞 Call us at +971 55 879 1747
📧 Email: muhammad@gorilla-estate.com
🌐 Website: https://gorilla-estate.com

Follow us on social media for the latest updates and listings:

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/gorilla_real_estate_dubai
Facebook: Gorilla Real Estate
LinkedIn: Gorilla Real Estate

description:
👉 Book a free consultation with Mohammed Zohaib: https://calendly.com/mohammedzohaib2023

DON’T FORGET TO FOLLOW ME:
Instagram:   https://www.instagram.com/mohammed_zohaib86/
Twitter:   https://x.com/ZohaibDubai
Linkedin : https://www.linkedin.com/in/mohammed-zohaib-68679432/
WhatsApp : +971 52 739 9992

Try booking a slot with Abdul Jibraan ; 
https://calendly.com/mrrealitydubai

Abdul Jibraan : +971 56 789 4079

Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/mr.reality.dubai/

MZ Website:  https://mohammedzohaib.com/

Is the Dubai property market about to crash in 2026? Or is this just a healthy correction? With prestigious developers holding unsold stock, major projects like Expo Valley facing delays, and villas sitting on the market for 8 months, the warning signs are there.

In this video, Mohammed Zohaib (17 Years Experience) and Jibraan break down the hard data. We explain exactly why this is NOT 2009, but why you should be worried about "OP minus 25%" distressed deals hitting the market soon.

In this 2026 Market Survival Guide, we cover:

🚨 The 30 Million Problem: Why luxury properties aren't selling.

📉 Crash vs. Correction: The thin line every investor must understand.

🏘️ Community Deep Dives: Average Price Per SQFT for Dubai Creek Harbor (DCH), Dubai Hills, JVC, Town Square, and Oasis by Emaar.

💰 The Red Flags: Why paying 2,600 PSF for off-plan could be a disaster.

📊 Liquidity & Absorption: Who is actually buying right now? (Hint: 70% of transactions are under 2.2M).

🔮 The Future: Why areas like Dubai Silicon Oasis (DSO) might be the real opportunity.

Want the specific reports mentioned in the video?

🔴 Dubai Creek Harbor Report: Comment "DCH" below.

🟢 Oasis by Emaar vs. Competition: Comment "OASIS" below.

🔵 DSO Investment Guide: Comment "DSO" below.

#dubairealestate  #DubaiPropertyCrash #dubaiinvestors  #realestate2026  #DCH #dubaihills  #jvc  #mohammedzohaib
